name: guide_component_accessibility
description: Provides accessibility guidelines. When hasImages=true, includes Vision AI accessibility guidelines. Use this tool for both code-based accessibility guidance and visual accessibility validation.

hasImages.description: Whether images are present for Vision AI accessibility analysis. When true, includes Vision AI guidelines.

mode.description: The mode of the MCP tool. "fix" means the tool will fix the issues found in the code. "analysis" means the tool will analyze the code and respond with a SARIF report.
